name: Bajalenguas
curation_log: DRAFT generated by the LLM strawman (design §3 step 5) from real corpus samples — cheap and disposable, never authoritative. Requires the full M1 procedure (mining passes, price-discrimination test, expert curation, reference validation) before launch.
Dry run on 50 corpus samples: coverage {'material': 0.6, 'esteril': 0.1}, illegal extractions 0.

attribute_defs.name: material
attribute_defs.curation_notes: Identity: el material distingue el bajalengua de madera (mayoria) del plastico autoclavable; dominio cerrado a los dos materiales observados.

attribute_defs.name: esteril
attribute_defs.curation_notes: Identity: la condicion esteril vs no esteril discrimina presentaciones del mismo insumo; regla 'no esteril' precede a 'esteril' para ganar la mas especifica.
